title: taraxacum karakoricum
intro: Taraxacum karakoricum, also known as Korean dandelion, is a perennial plant in the dandelion genus. It is native to Korea and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Asian medicine. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing liver damage and improving cardiovascular health. Taraxacum karakoricum is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and capsules, and is also consumed as a food ingredient, particularly in Korean cuisine.
